title: Change default workspace access to Consumer access (Public Preview)
body: Workspace admins can configure new users to receive Consumer access by default using group cloning. Consumer access provides access to Genie One, a view-only experience for business users who must view and interact with dashboards, Genie Spaces, and apps without creating workspace objects. The process creates a new group for existing users and updates the `users` group to grant only Consumer entitlement to new users by default. This preserves existing users' authoring permissions while streamlining consumer onboarding at scale. See [Migrate workspace entitlement control](/aws/en/security/auth/system-group-entitlements-migration).
